claim: GSE167339 Human1/Human2 show donor-level state-composition shifts between control and perturbed collagen scar-system conditions.
GSE167339 leave-donor-out transfer converges across held-out donors, with Human3 interpreted as hash-unknown robustness evidence.
GSE156326 and GSE181316 external scar cohorts show ECM-remodeling-rich dominant-state patterns in disease-context samples.
Scar pseudobulk module scores show positive descriptive deltas, with q values retained in source data and not presented as FDR-significant effects.
